description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named Analysis that runs on a schedule. The workflow should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: one for building and testing on Linux with various compilers and C++ standards, and another for SonarCloud static analysis. The Linux job should use a container, install dependencies, configure, build, and test OpenColorIO, while the SonarCloud job should configure, build, and analyze the code with build-wrapper and sonar-scanner.
